title: From Data to Decisions — AI Agents in Action (Gen AI Seminar)
subtitle: To introduce students to the fundamentals of Generative AI, AI agents, and Large Language Models (LLMs), and to inspire them to explore the field of AI through real-world applications and industry ins
description: BVP-OPTICA hosted an interactive seminar led by Ritik Sharma, a Generative AI expert at Cognizant and an OPTICA alumnus. The session focused on how AI agents function, the working principles behind LLMs, and how data-driven AI systems are transforming industries. The seminar included live demonstrations and code examples, making the session highly practical and engaging.
location: Bharati Vidyapeeth's College of Engineering, New Delhi
highlights: Expert talk on AI agents and LLM architecture
Live coding demonstrations of AI implementations
Insights into real-world industry applications of Generative AI
